statement.en: Female Competition and Maternal Effects in the House Mouse (Mus musculus domesticus)

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This appears to be a biological/behavioral study (house mouse maternal effects and female competition) published under cs.AI category, which is a categorical mismatch. The axiom itself—that maternal effects modulate female competitive outcomes in M. musculus domesticus—is empirically testable but the provisional 2026 date and arxiv cs.AI categorization suggest preprint status with validation pending. The core biological claim is not inherently undecidable but requires experimental replication.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 母の闘争が次世代の活力を静かに蝕む、平方根のように非線形に。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 競い合う母たちから、淡く降り注ぐ運命の線——次世代を刻む。
